EmployersJob seekersIndustriesWhy usContact

Australian workforce partner

Reliable labour hire and recruitment for teams that cannot afford downtime.

From site-ready crews to specialist technical roles, we connect employers with vetted people and support candidates with clear next steps—compliant, responsive, and built for major projects across Australia.

I'm hiringI'm looking for work

Mobilisation

Rapid rostering for shutdowns, peaks, and greenfield sites.

Compliance first

Right-to-work, inductions, and safety documentation aligned to your standards.

National coverage

Metro and regional placements with consistent account management.

Workforce supply that matches the pace of your project.

Whether you need a full crew for a civil programme, skilled trades for a maintenance window, or white-collar support for a delivery office, we run structured intake, reference checks, and mobilisation planning so your supervisors spend less time on admin and more time delivering.

  • Single point of contact and transparent rate structures
  • Scalable labour hire and permanent recruitment pathways
  • Safety-aligned shortlisting and site-ready handover packs
Book a workforce briefingRequest a call back

Your next role, with a team that respects your time.

We work across trades, operators, logistics, and technical disciplines. You will get honest role briefs, timely feedback, and support with onboarding paperwork—so you know what to expect before you set foot on site.

  • Transparent pay cycles and engagement types explained upfront
  • Advocacy with host employers when schedules or scopes shift
  • Pathways from contract to longer-term opportunities where available
Register your interestSend your résumé

Sectors we support every week.

Depth across industrial and professional verticals—so your hiring manager speaks with consultants who understand the work, not just the keywords.

Construction & civil

Site crews, supervisors, and project support for tiered supply chains.

Infrastructure & engineering

Technical and delivery roles for complex programmes and alliances.

Logistics & operations

Drivers, warehouse, and coordination roles tuned to peak volumes.

Built environment

Commercial, industrial, and facilities talent for operational readiness.

Why teams choose Capital Recruitment.

Operational rhythm

We align to your reporting cadence—daily stand-ups, weekly WIP, or milestone-based reviews.

Quality bar

Structured interviews, trade checks, and reference workflows reduce surprises on day one.

Human service

No black-box processes: you always know who owns your account and how to escalate.

What our partners say.

Ready to staff smarter—or take your next career step?

Tell us about your roster gap or your experience profile. We will respond with clear timelines, next actions, and realistic outcomes—no filler, no runaround.

Email our consultantsView contact options

Contact Capital Recruitment.

For employer workforce plans, candidate registrations, or media enquiries—reach us on the channel that suits you. We aim to acknowledge all messages within one business day.

Employers

Share scope, headcount, site locations, and start dates—we will confirm feasibility and propose a delivery plan.

enquiries@capitalrecruitment.com.au

Job seekers

Send a brief summary of your trade, tickets, and availability. Attach your CV if you have one—PDF preferred.

Same inbox—we route to the right desk

This site is informational only. Online job boards, applications, and file uploads will appear in a later release—use email for now.

Capital Recruitment

Labour hire and recruitment services for Australian employers and job seekers. Premium service, modern systems, people-first delivery.
